zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Tay是John Teye的兒子，於1401年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾。他和Lady Mary Margerie Smith至少有1個女兒。他去世於1470年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Soo, Chhay, Chin, Choo, Eng, Han, Heng, Khin, Li-Mei, Meng, Ming, Sang.  Vietnamese Dung, Loi, Thang, Thong, Tu.
English (Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Staffordshire): variant of   Tee   1.
Jewish (from Poland): metonymic occupational name for a tea merchant, from central Yiddish tay ‘tea’.

variants.name: Tays
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Tay  .

variants.name: Tee
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, see   Zheng   1.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 池, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Chi   1.

variants.name: Taye
meanings: Ethiopian: from the personal name Taye, which is interpreted as ‘he was seen’ in the Amharic language. — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.
English (mainly Middlesex): variant of   Tay   1. This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Tay was born in 1401, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Teye. He had at least 1 daughter with Lady Mary Margerie Smith. He died in 1470, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Tay est né en 1401, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Teye. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Lady Mary Margerie Smith. Il est décédé en 1470, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Tayは1401年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでJohn Teyeの息子として生まれた。彼はLady Mary Margerie Smithとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1470年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Tay(은)는 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 John Teye의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Lady Mary Margerie Smith(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.
